# diving.vakaviti.ai
# Fiji Diving Guide — Vakaviti.ai Network

> This page is a comprehensive guide to diving in Fiji, covering Beqa Lagoon shark dives, Rainbow Reef, the Great Astrolabe Reef, dive seasons, and operator logistics.

## Canonical Source
This content's canonical version is published at: https://vakaviti.ai/fiji-diving-guide

## About
Published by Vakaviti.ai, Fiji's AI tourism partner network. This guide is part of a series of single-topic Fiji travel guides designed for accuracy and depth on specific traveller intents.

- Mamanuca Islands Guide: https://mamanuca.vakaviti.ai
